Scaling relics looks better in stages too. Like we have some +Str brooch and +str pipe each time u deck resets. 2 stacks pipe>brooch
Yay fran
I assume arc1. Sometimes your deck don't reset twice before enemies die
(Just Mouchette things)
And the early str is needed to one shot enemies before the stacking str matters
E.g to reset your deck twice, you might need to wait for 5/6 turns
As a comparison, in Arc2. Against non bosses, you get a penalty for going over 6 turns (ignoring the nuances for now)
Regular yes but boss fights... They are slightly fat or have phases or "do not hit me or I kill u next turn" stance
